name: stereowood-color-system
description: STEREOWOOD Color Management System - Simplified for Factory Use (3-5 users)

scripts.phase0:verify: npm run audit:encoding && npm run smoke:phase0
scripts.phaseA:a0:verify: npm run phase0:verify && npm run audit:frontend-contract && npm run smoke:contract
scripts.phaseA:a1:verify: npm run phaseA:a0:verify && npm run audit:boundaries
scripts.phaseA:a3:verify: npm run phaseA:a3:db-dryrun && npm run phaseA:a3:api-smoke && npm run phase0:verify
scripts.phaseA:a4:verify: npm run phaseA:a4:auth-smoke && npm run phaseA:a4:readonly-smoke && npm run phase0:verify
scripts.phaseA:a5:verify: npm run phaseA:a5:stale-smoke && npm run phaseA:a5:contract-snapshot && npm run phase0:verify
scripts.phaseA:a7:verify: npm run phaseA:a7:pilot-parity && npm run phase0:verify
scripts.phaseP3:verify: npm run phaseP3:auth-admin-smoke && npm run phase0:verify
scripts.phaseP4:verify: npm run phaseP4:audit-feed-smoke && npm run phase0:verify
scripts.phaseP5:verify: npm run phaseP5:network-scan && npm run phase0:verify
scripts.phaseP6:verify: npm run phaseP6:pilot-write-smoke && npm run phaseP6:pilot-rollback-rehearsal && npm run phaseP6:pilot-write-docker-smoke && npm run phase0:verify
scripts.phaseL:auth-v2:verify: npm run phaseL:auth-rbac:smoke && npm run phaseL:auth-login-matrix:smoke && npm run phaseL:auth-login-ui-smoke && npm run phase0:verify

author: STEREOWOOD Team
